'''Tathak K'roylan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] covered in [[Color/Legends|black]] fur with tan patches, one directly over his [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He was the deputy intelligence leader for [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. He received information from a disguised [[Lumiya]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] with details pertaining to the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of several Bothan operatives on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was later part of the Bothan assault fleet sent to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] to break the blockade. He also received the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] [[Shamunaar (frigate)|''Shamunaar'']] after [[Matric Klauskin]] had killed the entire crew.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
